case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. CARMEL COONEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,423.45 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COONEY, CARMEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COONEY, CARMEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-27-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH JOHN LEGASPI (TITLE: COMMUNITY RELATIONS - PUBLIC INFORMATION OFFICER). THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COONEY, CARMEL $2,423.45 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,573.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COONEY, CARMEL
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT CCP. 116850 FILED BY DEFENDANT COONEY, CARMEL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT COONEY, CARMEL
